mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE active = 1
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY role_category ASC, role_idx ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE role_category = #{roleCategory} AND active = 1 ORDER BY role_idx ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE user_name LIKE '%' + #{userName} + '%' AND active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_manager WHERE user_name LIKE '%' + #{userName} + '%' AND active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_manager (role_category, role_detail, role_place, role_idx, user_name, user_mail, user_dept, user_company, role_ca_hd, role_ca_field, role_ca_team, is_admin, active, created_at) VALUES (#{roleCategory}, #{roleDetail}, #{rolePlace}, #{roleIdx}, #{userName}, #{userMail}, #{userDept}, #{userCompany}, #{roleCaHd}, #{roleCaField}, #{roleCaTeam}, #{isAdmin}, #{active}, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_manager SET role_category = #{roleCategory}, role_detail = #{roleDetail}, role_place = #{rolePlace}, role_idx = #{roleIdx}, user_name = #{userName}, user_mail = #{userMail}, user_dept = #{userDept}, user_company = #{userCompany}, role_ca_hd = #{roleCaHd}, role_ca_field = #{roleCaField}, role_ca_team = #{roleCaTeam}, is_admin = #{isAdmin}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}
